name: Caviar with Shallots and Olive Oil Over Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate heat.
2. Add the chopped shallots and cook until they sizzle.
3. Pour the shallots with the remaining oil over individual servings of pasta.
4. Top each serving with a dollop of caviar and sprinkle with chives.
